notes: v1.14.155 - Square-card POLISH (CSS-only). Removes the base .rf-card saturate(1.40) that muddied the neon icons on the .154 square treatment (icons now render at full mock punch); title+meta flow in the flex column bottom-left instead of pinned absolutes, so 2-line metas (OPTICS, DEPLOY) stack under the title instead of colliding; icon opacity 0.52->1.0 with a to-top bottom scrim for legibility; active state pops via glow (opacity maxed). No icon/asset/markup change -> SW precache LIST unchanged, CACHE_VERSION bump busts HTML. Base .rf-card untouched, all overrides body.rd redesign-grid-scoped, ?legacy=1 byte-identical. One str_replace, 17/17 braces (file 10138/10138). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP): reopen, confirm v1.14.155; Reference/Work/Tools icons are bright/crisp (not muddy); titles + metas both readable bottom-left with NO overlap (check OPTICS + DEPLOY 2-line metas); press a card -> glow pop. ROLLBACK: restore .154 block + revert 3 stamps.
